title: Thresholds Configuration
subtitle: Manage compliance limits, IIMA ecological flows, and hazard rating configurations.

wqTable.noThresholds: No thresholds found matching the filters.
wqTable.confirmReset: Are you sure you want to reset this threshold to the default REIWQ Appendix A guideline?
wqTable.groupSuccess: Group water quality thresholds adjusted successfully.

eflowTab.title: IIMA Interim Target Instream Flows
eflowTab.description: Seeded according to IIMA Article 6 / Annexure I / Table 5-4 targets. These targets define the required transboundary ecological flows.

allocationsTab.title: IIMA Treaty Water Allocations
allocationsTab.description: Seeded according to IAAP-10 / IIMA treaty water allocations. These targets define the maximum allowable annual abstractions by country and user category.
allocationsTab.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this water allocation record?

hazardTab.floodDesc: Formula-based scoring framework (FSW) mapping structural indicator ratings to standard alert bands.
hazardTab.droughtDesc: Drought Index scoring framework (Ds) mapping subcatchment precipitation and storage levels to severity levels.
hazardTab.chemicalDesc: Maximum Mass Allowable (MMA) categories per hazardous substance release. Conservative-default rule applies.
hazardTab.biologicalDesc: Configurable operational surveillance thresholds for routine management area surveillance.
